creator: clsung@FreeBSD.org
text:
Hi,

>make fetch
=3D> replaceit-1.0.0.tar.gz doesn't seem to exist in /usr/ports/distfiles/.
=3D> Attempting to fetch from http://pldaniels.com/replaceit/.
replaceit-1.0.0.tar.gz                        100% of 4589  B   10 kBps

    Do we really need to add "www."?

On Tue, Oct 24, 2006 at 04:14:56PM -0400, Thomas Abthorpe wrote:
>=20
> >Number:         104771
> >Category:       ports
> >Synopsis:       [PATCH] textproc/replaceit: make fetchable
> >Confidential:   no
> >Severity:       non-critical
> >Priority:       low

> GoodKing.Ca
> >Environment:
> System: FreeBSD goodking.goodking.ca 6.2-PRERELEASE FreeBSD 6.2-PRERELEAS=
E #2: Mon Oct  2 02:05:54 EDT
> >Description:
> - make fetchable by adding www to MASTER_SITES address
> - fix WWW pkg-descr with leading www.
>=20
